3317680.name: 광기의 함정(The Madness Trap Trek)
3317680.description:
The Madness Trap Trek is an action-adventure dungeon escape game focused on intense trap-dodging and fast-paced survival.

Each stage challenges you to escape the dungeon in a unique way, while hidden shield items scattered throughout the map may become your only key to survival, granting you extra lives when you need them most.

But the path forward is brutal.

Memorize every trap, react instantly, and fight to stay alive.

Featuring 8 carefully designed stages, The Madness Trap Trek is an action-puzzle game where the difficulty rises relentlessly and every mistake can be fatal.

Stages 1–4 are designed to be accessible even for beginners, allowing players to learn the mechanics and build confidence as they push forward quickly.

But make no mistake—this is only the warm-up.

From Stage 5, the real trap parade begins.

More complex and unforgiving traps stand in your way, and finding the escape warp becomes the key to survival.

In Stages 6–7, players with strong reflexes and sharp control may be able to break through—but this is where true skill is tested.

And then comes Stage 8 — the ultimate challenge.

So difficult that even the developer could not clear it perfectly, this final stage is packed with powerful traps and unpredictable obstacles waiting to crush the unprepared.

Yet, it is not impossible.

Clear the final stage and reach the ending, and you will earn the title of true master of physical skill.
